notes: Worked example for engine CONTRACT-scenery-structure-metadata (a wall with one window). The rows above author ONLY the semantics (what each part IS); the GEOMETRY (footprint + span_world) is MEASURED by the bake from wall_window_v1_hitbox.json. Eyes above the sill see over the wall and THROUGH the glass band (sill 0-1 opaque, glass 1-2.2 transparent, lintel 2.2-3 opaque); a thrown stone is stopped and cracks the glass (default block_and_damage + damage_variant_role:damaged); a bullet passes the glass with no damage (by_class.bullet:pass_ignore); the frame survives a smashed window because sill/glass/lintel are separate volumes.
